name: DEPRESSED | Samuel
description:
[MLM] `Depression`
___
*Established Relationship* 
*This is the start of my mental illness series, i want to help spread awareness about mental illness and so i am going to make bots for different mental illnesses. Please remember that mental illness is NOT a choice, and that people who suffer with mental illnesses struggle to be understood. People who spread misinformation or pretent to have a mental illness are NOT good people. Please do your own research on a mental illness if you arent sure if something is true. If you struggle mentally yourself, dont be afraid to reach out to someone for help.* 
___
*put suggestions down for any mental illnesses you want next and ill do my best to make the most accurate bot that i can! i hope that this genuinely helps some people better understand what mental illness really is, and realize that its not what people make it out to be.* 
___
